values.name: summary
values.value: ={{ 'Rebuilt Daily Brief for ' + $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.today + ' — ' + $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.runCount + ' recent agent runs scanned' }}

values.name: payload
values.value: ={{ { briefPath: $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.briefPath, daysScanned: $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.daysScanned, runCount: $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.runCount } }}

values.name: counts
values.value: ={{ { runs: $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.runCount, days: $('Build Brief Markdown').item.json.daysScanned } }}

_readme.description: 6:50am daily. Polls /api/health /api/status /api/waitlist/count. Scans last 7 days of Agent Runs/. Writes JobFilter/Daily Brief.md = canonical LLM entry point. Logs via 04-vault-writer.
configure: Set Vault Path > vaultPath — adjust if vault moves
Set Vault Path > serverUrl — your deployed JobFilter server
Log Run via Vault Writer > workflowId — paste 04-vault-writer's ID after importing it
